nodes.name: RapidAPI – IMDB data
nodes.notes: Header: X-RapidAPI-Key and X-RapidAPI-Host must be set in the credential named 'RapidAPI IMDB'

values.content: You are a film curator. You receive a JSON array of popular movies. Identify the single strongest recurring theme across the list (e.g. 'heist films', 'sci-fi survival', 'psychological thriller'). Return ONLY valid JSON — no markdown, no explanation — in this exact shape: {"theme": "<theme name>", "reasoning": "<one sentence>", "emoji": "<single relevant emoji>"}
={{ JSON.stringify($input.all().map(i => ({ title: i.json.title, genres: i.json.genres, year: i.json.release_year }))) }}

You are a film recommendation engine. Given a theme, return exactly 5 movie recommendations. Return ONLY valid JSON array — no markdown — each item: {"title": string, "year": number, "hook": string (≤120 chars), "why": string (≤80 chars)}

=Theme: "{{ $json.theme }}". Reasoning: {{ $json.reasoning }}. Recommend 5 movies that fit this theme perfectly. Avoid movies already in this list: {{ $('Collect all movies').all().map(i=>i.json.title).join(', ') }}

placeholders.TMDB_CRED_ID: Create in n8n → Settings → Credentials → HTTP Header Auth. Header name: Authorization, value: Bearer YOUR_TMDB_API_KEY
placeholders.RAPIDAPI_CRED_ID: Create HTTP Header Auth credential with two headers: X-RapidAPI-Key and X-RapidAPI-Host: imdb236.p.rapidapi.com
placeholders.OPENAI_CRED_ID: Create OpenAI credential with your API key
